title: monardella × subglabra
intro: Monardella × subglabra, also known as Purple Mountain Monardella, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Monardella × subglabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Monardella × subglabra can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to address various health concerns, including colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
